user.title: Profile Setup
user.description: Create a new agent profile with a unique name and personality.

server.title: Server Configuration
server.description: Configure your inference server URL and MCP server port.

data_description.model_name: The LLM model this profile should use.
data_description.system_prompt: Optional. Leave blank to use the built-in system prompt from the integration code.
data_description.technical_prompt: Optional. Leave blank to use the built-in technical instructions from the integration code.

data_description.enabled_tools: Optional. Leave blank to inherit whatever tool families are enabled on the shared MCP server. If you choose specific items here, this profile will be narrowed to that subset only. Each selected family must also be enabled in the shared MCP server settings to actually work. Device tools add physical-device discovery. Response service tools add native HA reads like forecasts and calendars. Recorder tools answer history questions. Assist bridge tools expose HA's native Assist API. Calculator tools add math and unit conversion. Music Assistant tools add richer music search and playback.

mcp_server.title: Shared MCP Server Settings
mcp_server.description: ⚠️ These settings affect ALL profiles. Changes here will impact every MCP Assist conversation agent.

data_description.mcp_port: The local port used by the shared MCP server.
data_description.allowed_ips: Optional comma-separated IP addresses or CIDR ranges that may connect in addition to localhost.

search.name: Search
search.description: Configure optional web search tools exposed by the shared MCP server.

data_description.search_provider: Choose whether the shared MCP server should expose web search tools, and which provider to use.
data_description.brave_api_key: Required only when Brave Search is selected.

discovery.name: Discovery
discovery.description: Control how the shared MCP server builds and returns discovery results.

data_description.enable_gap_filling: Builds a compact system index to keep discovery fast and context-aware.
data_description.max_entities_per_discovery: Caps how many entities a single discovery call may return.

tools.name: Tools
tools.description: Choose which optional tool families the shared MCP server exposes.

data_description.enabled_tools: Choose which optional tool families the shared MCP server exposes to profiles and external MCP clients. Device tools add physical-device discovery. Response service tools add native HA service-response reads. Recorder tools add history analysis. Assist bridge tools expose HA's native Assist API. Calculator tools add math and unit conversion. Music Assistant tools add rich music search and playback.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the inference server. Make sure it's running and accessible.
error.no_models: No models loaded on the server. Please load a model first.
error.invalid_model: The specified model is not available on the server.
error.invalid_ip: Invalid IP address or CIDR range format. Use comma-separated values like: 172.30.0.0/16, 192.168.1.100
error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON format. Please check your MCP servers configuration.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please verify your API key.

abort.already_configured: A profile with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.

data_description.model_name: The LLM model this profile should use.
data_description.system_prompt: Optional. Leave blank to use the built-in system prompt from the integration code.
data_description.technical_prompt: Optional. Leave blank to use the built-in technical instructions from the integration code.

data_description.enabled_tools: Optional. Leave blank to inherit whatever tool families are enabled on the shared MCP server. If you choose specific items here, this profile will be narrowed to that subset only. Each selected family must also be enabled in the shared MCP server settings to actually work. Device tools add physical-device discovery. Response service tools add native HA reads like forecasts and calendars. Recorder tools answer history questions. Assist bridge tools expose HA's native Assist API. Calculator tools add math and unit conversion. Music Assistant tools add richer music search and playback.
